omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When you place an order, we share your information with the restaurant or retail partner to facilitate the order. This may include your name, delivery address, and phone number.

When you place an order, we share your information with the restaurant or retail partner to facilitate the order. This may include your name, delivery address, and phone number.

We may share your information with our third-party partners for marketing and advertising purposes. This may include your email address, device identifiers, and information about your orders and browsing behaviour. You can opt-out of this sharing.

We may share your information with our third-party partners for marketing and advertising purposes. This may include your email address, device identifiers, and information about your orders and browsing behaviour. You can opt-out of this sharing.

We use location data to show you restaurants and retail partners near you, to provide more accurate delivery times, and for advertising and analytics purposes. We may share your location data with our third-party partners for these purposes.
